instruction: Explain why the sky appears blue during the day.
response: Sunlight contains all colors. As it passes through the atmosphere, shorter (blue) wavelengths scatter much more than longer ones (Rayleigh scattering), so the sky looks blue.

Summarize the plot of Romeo and Juliet in two sentences.
response: Two young lovers from feuding families fall for each other and secretly marry. A series of misunderstandings leads them both to take their own lives, which finally reconciles their families.

instruction: Convert 100 degrees Fahrenheit to Celsius and show the formula.
Give three tips for writing a clear commit message.
response: 1) Use a short imperative subject line. 2) Explain the why, not just the what, in the body. 3) Reference related issues or context so future readers have it.
